changes.reason: Use Batch D only and avoid the prior failed structure-gate path. The profile has high convex payoff but relatively long average hold; reducing the maximum target one grid step tests whether exposure efficiency improves without deleting entries.
Step the target multiplier down from 1.25 to 1.15, preserving larger-than-pullback targets while testing faster realization for a 7-trade, high-MFE profile.

Keep the exit-compression test from expanding into low-quality wall chases. Current profile median ES-VWAP distance is about 14.4 and current cap is 25, so 22 remains permissive but cuts the farthest extension tail.

recommendation.expected_effect: Should improve charm_wall_breakaway_long PnL per exposure hour and reduce average hold/heat while retaining most of the profile's convex PnL. Tradeoff is that smaller targets may cut the profile's large winners; reject if profile PnL/exposure falls below roughly 220, total net profit drops below 98% of run_001, or worst MAE worsens.
recommendation.label: charm-wall-exit-efficiency
recommendation.rationale: This is a single-family Batch D experiment. The latest leader context says not to repeat broad pullback tightening, 1DTE quality gates, call-wall expansion, or global veto tightening. charm_wall_breakaway_long is under-sampled but high quality: 7 VALID_0DTE trades, $1120.6 PnL, 240.5 PnL/exposure hour, median MFE 107.1, no slow trades, and better worst MAE than the pullback/charm-pin tails. Prior Batch D structure tightening hurt, so this isolates exit efficiency and a mild profile-local distance cap rather than raising structure floors.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_wall_breakaway_long has only 7 trades but contributes $1120.6 with 160.1 average PnL, 240.5 PnL/exposure hour, median TP 12.0, median MFE 107.1, and no slow >=12h trades. The weakness is exposure/heat from long average hold, not entry count.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Wall Breakaway Exit Efficiency
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Small sample; compressing targets can reduce the convex payoff that makes the profile valuable, so a lower hold time alone is not sufficient for promotion.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE charm-wall breakaway entries with confirmed breakout context and extended target distances.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Profile PnL/exposure remains above 220, total net profit remains at least 98% of run_001, completed trades decline by no more than 3, average hold or average MAE improves, and total worst MAE does not worsen.
